title: License Extension Module
description: Additional license fields from the basic metadata template (hub-docs/modelcard.md) that have no counterpart in the human-readable template. The base license field already exists in modeldetails; this module captures the extra fields needed when license is set to 'other'.

license_name.description: Custom license identifier when license is set to 'other'.

license_link.description: Path or URL to the license file when license is set to 'other'. Use 'LICENSE' or 'LICENSE.md' for in-repo files.
